nodes.name: Luck
nodes.description: Primary currency from rolling dice

nodes.name: Prestige Luck
nodes.description: Premium currency earned from prestige

nodes.name: Momentum
nodes.description: Speed stacks from consecutive rolls

nodes.name: Talent Points
nodes.description: Points available to spend on talents

nodes.name: Inspiration
nodes.description: Reroll tokens earned from achievements

nodes.name: Paths Chosen
nodes.description: Number of talent paths with points invested

nodes.name: Active Dice
nodes.description: Number of dice currently rolling

nodes.name: Last Roll
nodes.description: Result of the most recent roll

nodes.name: Total Rolls
nodes.description: Total number of dice rolls ever

nodes.name: Total Luck Earned
nodes.description: Total luck earned from all rolls

nodes.name: Auto-Roll Interval
nodes.description: Milliseconds between auto-rolls (default 60 seconds)

nodes.name: Critical Roll Chance
nodes.description: Chance (0-1) for a critical roll multiplier

nodes.name: Critical Multiplier
nodes.description: Multiplier applied on critical rolls

nodes.name: Fracture
nodes.description: Your die shatters into many, each a fragment of the original's power

nodes.name: Hairline Crack
nodes.description: +2% chance per rank to count roll twice

nodes.name: Stress Test
nodes.description: +5% roll value per rank, +1% break chance

nodes.name: Shard Affinity
nodes.description: Shards last +0.5s per rank

nodes.name: Instability
nodes.description: +1 temp die per rank when die breaks

nodes.name: Fracture Memory
nodes.description: +3% permanent bonus per rank per break this run

nodes.name: Twin Dice
nodes.description: Permanently have 2 dice (60% size each)

nodes.name: Cascade
nodes.description: Rolling doubles triggers +1 free roll per rank

nodes.name: Resonance
nodes.description: Same-value dice multiply together (+10% bonus per rank)

nodes.name: Shard Collector
nodes.description: Broken pieces auto-roll, generating +20% value per rank

nodes.name: Sympathetic Vibration
nodes.description: When one die crits, +5% crit chance per rank for others

nodes.name: Dice Storm
nodes.description: +1 maximum dice per rank (up to 5 total)

nodes.name: Synchronized Roll
nodes.description: All dice roll simultaneously, +5% combined value per rank

nodes.name: Perfect Split
nodes.description: Each die retains more face upgrades from original (+20% per rank)

nodes.name: Echo Roll
nodes.description: +5% chance per rank for shards to echo their last roll

nodes.name: Swarm Intelligence
nodes.description: +2% bonus per rank for each active die

nodes.name: Singularity Collapse
nodes.description: Once per prestige, combine ALL dice into one mega-roll

nodes.name: Velocity
nodes.description: Time bends to your will - roll faster, chain reactions, enter fever mode

nodes.name: Quick Flick
nodes.description: +10% roll animation speed per rank

nodes.name: Momentum
nodes.description: +2 max momentum per rank, faster stack gain

nodes.name: Auto-Roll I
nodes.description: Die auto-rolls every 30 seconds

nodes.name: Roll Echo
nodes.description: +3% chance per rank for previous roll to count again

nodes.name: Anticipation
nodes.description: +5% luck per rank when waiting between rolls

nodes.name: Blur
nodes.description: +10% roll speed per rank, adds motion blur effect

nodes.name: Chain Reaction
nodes.description: +3% chance per rank to trigger free re-roll

nodes.name: Perpetual Motion
nodes.description: -4 seconds auto-roll interval per rank

nodes.name: Hot Streak
nodes.description: +5% value per rank after 3+ consecutive good rolls

nodes.name: Ricochet
nodes.description: +4% chance per rank for die to bounce and re-roll

nodes.name: Time Dilation
nodes.description: Roll animation approaches instant (0.2s at max)

nodes.name: Auto-Roll III
nodes.description: Auto-rolls every 2 seconds at max rank

nodes.name: Fever Mode
nodes.description: At max momentum, enter fever mode (+50% value per rank)

nodes.name: Lightspeed
nodes.description: Ricochet rolls happen instantly (+10% extra value each)

nodes.name: Temporal Loop
nodes.description: Once per minute, replay the last 10 seconds of rolls

nodes.name: Augment
nodes.description: Raw power flows through your dice - bigger numbers, critical strikes, face manipulation

nodes.name: Weighted Dice
nodes.description: +1 to all face values per rank

nodes.name: Lucky Charm
nodes.description: 6s count as +1 higher per rank (6 → 7, 8, etc.)

nodes.name: Dense Core
nodes.description: +5% roll value per rank, -2% animation speed

nodes.name: Fortune's Favor
nodes.description: +2% luck multiplier per rank

nodes.name: Inner Strength
nodes.description: +10% base luck production per rank

nodes.name: Face Enhancement
nodes.description: Unlock elemental face upgrades for dice

nodes.name: Critical Roll
nodes.description: +1% crit chance per rank (3x multiplier)

nodes.name: Loaded Dice
nodes.description: Can 'lock' one additional face per rank

nodes.name: Pip Inflation
nodes.description: Each pip worth +10% base value per rank

nodes.name: Gravity Well
nodes.description: +2% chance per rank for higher numbers

nodes.name: Legendary Faces
nodes.description: Unlock legendary face tier with unique effects

nodes.name: Critical Cascade
nodes.description: Crits have +5% chance per rank to trigger another crit

nodes.name: Empowered State
nodes.description: After max value roll, next 5 rolls +10% per rank

nodes.name: Overdrive
nodes.description: All roll values +20% per rank when luck > 1000

nodes.name: Perfect Roll
nodes.description: Once per prestige, automatically roll maximum possible value
